wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation|2}}{{Character Infobox|Defect2}} The {{2|Defect}} is the last of the five characters in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. It is unlocked after completing a run with the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}. It starts with 75 Max HP. At {{Asc|2|Ascension|2}} and above it starts with 56 HP. == Starting Loadout == === Starting Relic === {{R|Cracked Core||2}} - At the start of each combat, {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}. Can be replaced by {{R|Infused Core||2}}. === Starting Deck === These {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Basic|Cards|2}} cannot be obtained through regular card rewards. * {{C|Strike (Defect)|Strike|2}} x4 * {{C|Defend (Defect)|Defend|2}} x4 * {{C|Zap||2}} x1 * {{C|Dualcast||2}} x1 === Defect Cards === There are a total of 83 regular cards in Defects's card pool. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Defect_Skill_Common.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Common|Common Cards|2}} x20 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Defect_Skill_Uncommon.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon Cards|2}} x37 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Defect_Skill_Rare.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} x26 When playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, these cards get added to the card pool: * {{C|Energy Surge||2}} * {{C|Ignition||2}} There are also five cards that are not obtainable through normal means. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Defect_Skill_Ancient.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Ancient|Ancient Cards|2}} x2 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Defect_Skill_Event.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&rarity:Event|Event Cards|2}} x3
A full list of Defect Cards (and more) can be found {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect|here|2}}. == Unique Relics == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Relic |- |'''Common''' |{{R|Data Disk||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{R|Gold-Plated Cables||2}}, {{R|Symbiotic Virus||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{R|Emotion Chip||2}}, {{R|Metronome||2}}, {{R|Power Cell||2}} |- |'''Shop''' |{{R|Runic Capacitor||2}} |} == Unique Potions == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Potion |- |'''Common''' |{{P|Focus Potion||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{P|Potion of Capacity||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{P|Essence of Darkness||2}} |} == Unlocks == The Defect is unlocked by completing a run with the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}. This does not have to be a win. Like all characters, there are 6 Epochs in the [[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline|Timeline]] which are discovered upon reaching certain Defect gameplay milestones, unlocking Cards, Relics, and Potions unique to the Defect. {| class="wikitable" |+ ![[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline#The Defect|Epoch]]
